# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    Q = int(data[1])
    treatments = list(map(int, data[2:]))
    
    # Initialize a boolean array to represent the presence of a tooth in each hole
    teeth_present = [True] * (N + 1)  # Using 1-based indexing
    
    for t in treatments:
        # Toggle the state of the tooth in hole t
        teeth_present[t] = not teeth_present[t]
    
    # Count the number of teeth present
    count = sum(teeth_present[1:])  # Skip index 0
    
    print(count)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
